new_classes.label_en: Wine quality: neither PDO, nor PGI, nor variety/vintage designation
new_classes.label_de: Weinqualität: weder g.U. noch g.g.A. noch Rebsorte/Jahrgang
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a still wine of fresh grapes that does not carry a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.), a protected geographical indication (PGI/g.g.A.), nor a variety or vintage designation, as distinguished within CN subheading 2204 21.

new_classes.label_en: Other still wine (no PDO/PGI/variety/vintage), actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol, in containers ≤ 2 l (CN 2204 21 98)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein (ohne g.U./g.g.A./Rebsorte/Jahrgang), tatsächlicher Alkoholgehalt > 15 % vol, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (KN 2204 21 98)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes with no PDO, no PGI, no variety and no vintage designation, with an actual alcoholic strength exceeding 15% vol, presented in containers of 2 litres or less. Classified under CN 2204 21 98 per Additional Notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22.

new_properties.label_en: actual alcoholic strength by volume percent

coverage_explanation: The primary discriminating criteria are captured: (1) wine of fresh grapes (parent class WineFreshGrapesGrapeMust2204), (2) container ≤ 2 l (SmallContainer part restriction), (3) not sparkling / not semi-sparkling (complement restrictions on SparklingWineQuality and SemiSparklingWineQuality), (4) no PDO/PGI/Tokaj designation (complement restrictions + NoPDONoPGINoVarietyNoVintageWineQuality quality), (5) actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol (decimalRange minExclusive 15.0). A coverage gap remains because Additional Notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22 define technical criteria (total dry extract, non-volatile constituents such as sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts) that are used to further discriminate between sub-subheadings 22042111 to 22042198; these compositional thresholds cannot be fully encoded without introducing new quality classes and data properties for each constituent (total dry extract g/l, sugar content, etc.), which are not yet present in the TBox. The 'variety/vintage' exclusion criterion (distinguishing 22042198 from codes that carry a variety or vintage label) is modelled via the NoPDONoPGINoVarietyNoVintageWineQuality quality class but the TBox has no sibling 'VarietyVintageWineQuality' class to make the complement unambiguous. Coverage is therefore estimated at 0.75.
